scope_contract.pre_existing_treatment: Working tree contains cross-session clutter (e.g. docs/dev/*-20260525-050824.json artifacts, tests/generated/20260525-050824/*, scripts/lifecycle-baseline-import.sh, logs/lifecycle.jsonl, hooks/lib/README.md, hooks/doc_sync/*, etc.). We retain the dev-report 'created' label since the dev-report is the cycle-diff source-of-truth; the dev-report semantics here mean 'authored/landed by this cycle's work', not 'git-new vs HEAD'.

_findings_tagging_note: All finding lists are empty. Per Mechanism (ii) inspector-side tagging contract, any finding emitted in --changed-files mode WOULD carry introduced_in_diff: true|false. Zero findings means zero cleanliness violations introduced in this cycle-diff. Pre-existing cross-session clutter is acknowledged in scope_contract.pre_existing_treatment and is OUT of this verdict's scope.

verdict.rationale: Zero cleanliness violations introduced by the 20-file cycle-diff. All 3 new files are properly referenced (3/3 documented + 2 functionally invoked from tests); all modifications stay within established folder conventions; no temp/backup/build-artifact files introduced; no naming-convention deviations; new folder tests/score-inject-contract/ ships with both INDEX.md and README.md per folder rules; no orphan scripts/agents/commands/dead-functions traceable to cycle-diff.
verdict.per_AC_2_6_verdict_plumbing: CLOSE: YES from cleanliness-inspector — no NEW file-level cleanliness violations introduced. Pre-existing tree clutter explicitly excluded per orchestrator scope contract and per AC-2.6 (b) default-safe ignore rule for ambiguous/untagged pre-existing items.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: 6 findings: 3 ISSUE (orphan-script coverage overclaim, naming hex-char count error, out-of-scope file in evidence list) + 3 OBSERVATION_ONLY (check-file-references exit-code wording, duplicate detector total instability, 'created' semantics). Zero blockers. Verdict unaffected.
